plot outline: When John Connor, leader of the human resistance, sends Sgt. Kyle Reese back to 1984 to protect Sarah Connor and safeguard the future, an unexpected turn of events creates a fractured time-line. Now, Sgt. Reese finds himself in a new and unfamiliar version of the past, where he is faced with unlikely allies, including the Guardian, dangerous new enemies, and an unexpected new mission: To reset the future.
title: Terminator Genisys

production companies.name: Canadian Film or Video Production Tax Credit (CPTC)

other companies.name: American Roadshow Motion Picture And Television Catering
International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
